summary: Completed P0 and P2 feature testing for feedback system and Become a Mentor CTA
seed_data_creation: Created test feedbacks via POST /api/feedback during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P2 features verified working. Feedback system fully operational with user submissions, admin replies, and modal detail view. Become a Mentor CTA present on homepage and navigates to /pro/join.

P0_feedback_system.POST /api/feedback: PASS - User can submit feedback with all types (improvement, testimonial, bug, feature)
P0_feedback_system.GET /api/my-feedback: PASS - Returns user's feedbacks with replies
P0_feedback_system.GET /api/admin/feedback: PASS - Admin can see all feedbacks
P0_feedback_system.POST /api/admin/feedback/{id}/reply: PASS - Admin can reply to feedback, creates notification
P0_feedback_system.PATCH /api/admin/feedback/{id}: PASS - Admin can update feedback status
P0_feedback_system./feedback page: PASS - Shows form with type selector, star rating, message input, submit button
P0_feedback_system./my-feedback page: PASS - Shows user's feedback cards with type badges, reply counts, View reply links
P0_feedback_system.Feedback detail modal: PASS - Opens showing original message and Team Response with admin reply

P2_mentor_cta./pro/join page: PASS - Loads correctly with mentor application form
P2_mentor_cta.Homepage CTA: PASS - Present in code at line 562-606 with data-testid='home-become-mentor-cta', routes to /pro/join
P2_mentor_cta.CTA visibility: CTA is between VIP section and News section, may require scrolling depending on screen content
